The '''Sidi Driss Inn''' was an elegant [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] located in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]], on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a [[Moisture farm/Legends|moisture farm]] in the final days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Dama Whitesun Brunk]] and her newly-married husband transformed it into an inn, which grew more luxuriant over the years. During the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], it was still run by Dama, who was assisted by a [[Pa'lowick/Legends|Pa'lowick]] named [[Keesa]].

==History==
===Rise of the Empire===
The Inn contained a special suite designed specifically for the use of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]. [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] and [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla the Elder]] met there on occasion.<ref name="TG" />

===New Republic===
It was here that [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] members [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] stayed to avoid being recognized by any locals or [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. They were recovering from exposure to a severe sandstorm, during their [[Mission to Tatooine (Killik Twilight)|mission]] to recover ''[[Killik Twilight]]'' and the hidden [[Shadowcast]] key it contained. Imperial forces, led personally by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] (disguised as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]), discovered the Solos here, leading to a firefight and the Solos' escape. This would mark the first occasion that the Solos came across Thrawn in his [[Thrawn campaign|final campaign]] against the New Republic.<ref name="TG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Hôtel Sidi Driss]] in Matmata, Tunisia, was the real location where interior shots of the [[Lars homestead/Legends|Lars homestead]] were filmed for [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].
